title: Female Reproduction System
question:
Place where fertilisation between sperm and ovum occurs /
Tempat persenyawaan antara sperma dan ovum berlaku

Produces female gamete (ovum) and female sex hormones / 
Menghasilkan gamet betina (ovum) dan hormon seks wanita

Place where the embryo develops and grows / 
Tempat embrio berkembang dan membesar

Produces mucus to enable sperms to swim into the uterus / 
Mengeluarkan mukus untuk memudahkan sperma berenang ke dalam uterus

Receives sperms and as a channel through which a baby is born / 
Menerima sperma dan menjadi saluran bayi dilahirkan
